message:
feat(indexer): wire add_messages_from_packet into persist callers [coding_agent_session_search-5b9p0]

ibuuh.32 follow-up shipped. The lexical sink in the live persist path
now consumes ConversationPacket projections instead of re-walking the
raw NormalizedConversation. Closes the gap surfaced in 2fb735b1's
PACKET_SINK_MIGRATIONS catalog: the lexical helper landed in
19820c7a was unwired in the live persist callers because indexer/mod.rs
was under exclusive file_reservation lock at the time.

What landed:
- Persist mod: imports ConversationPacket + ConversationPacketProvenance.
- Helper lexical_packet_for_persist(conv) — builds the packet ONCE
  per conversation so InlineRebuildFromScan + IncrementalInline
  share the same builder pass.
- Helper positional_indices_for_inserted(packet, inserted_indices)
  maps outcome.inserted_indices (message *idx* values) onto
  positional indices into packet.payload.messages. Source order
  preserved; duplicates collapsed via HashSet; unmatched idx values
  yield an empty positional set (matches legacy filter behavior).
- 4 call sites migrated to TantivyIndex::add_messages_from_packet:
  - persist_conversation (single, line ~16203)
  - persist_conversations_batched_inner serial path: InlineRebuildFromScan
    (line ~16435) + IncrementalInline (line ~16445)
  - persist_conversations_batched_begin_concurrent: InlineRebuildFromScan
    (line ~15986) + IncrementalInline (line ~15995)

Equivalence gate (new test):
- positional_indices_for_inserted_maps_idx_values_to_packet_positions
  pins the positional-mapping contract using a fixture with non-monotonic
  idx values (0, 5, 7) and exercises:
  * empty inserted_indices ⇒ empty positional set
  * single idx ⇒ single position
  * non-contiguous idx ⇒ multiple positions in source order
    (NOT inserted_indices order)
  * unmatched idx values (caller passed stale list) ⇒ empty
  * full coverage ⇒ all positions
  * duplicate idx values in input ⇒ deduplicated to single position
  A regression that mis-mapped idx → position would silently drop
  or duplicate documents in the lexical sink; this catches it.

36/36 indexer::persist lib tests + 75/75 cli_index integration tests
green via rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/rch_target_cass_p2
cargo test --lib indexer::persist + --test cli_index. No regressions
on the existing persist_conversations_batched_* registration / source
lookup test suite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
